package.name: vla_so101_description
package.description: AIR26 workshop 07 (VLA) — SO-ARM100/101 tabletop scene for the SmolVLA demo: the MuJoCo Menagerie SO-ARM100 arm (6 position joints = the SO-101 action space) + a table, three graspable/stackable cubes, and front/top cameras. Reference meshes + scene only.
